name: 16p13_1_LCR16a_NDE1
description: 16p13.1 LCR16a-rich region surrounding NDE1, MYH11 and ABCC1. The LCR16a duplicon family is the founder of chromosome 16's SD evolution (Bailey 2002; Johnson 2001) and is enriched here as multiple copies in direct orientation. Mediates 16p13.11 microdeletion/microduplication CNVs.

architecture.internal_structure: Multiple LCR16a duplicons (~20 kb core unit) plus LCR16b modules, organised in three large SD blocks at >95% identity flanking NDE1/MYH11/ABCC1/KIAA0430. LCR16a is the seed duplicon for nearly all chromosome 16 SDs.
